steps.name: Enter the user's email in the 'Email' field
Enter the user's password in the 'Password' field

steps.name: Set start and end date: 10-07-2025 to 10-07-2025
Select 'MerchantCompanyForTestRunOnly Inc.' business unit using filter
Click on the first transaction 'Copy NPGW reference to clipboard' button
Click on 'System administration' menu in Header
Click on the NPGW reference input field
Paste from clipboard into NPGW reference input field using Ctrl+V
Verify: The correct reference value is pasted from the clipboard.
